meaning: vt.识别,鉴别,把...和...看成一样v.确定
examples: First of all we must identify the problem areas.
The new technique has been used to identify the sex of fetuses.
Sales departments try to identify a product's USP or 'unique selling point'.
Coombs contended Manning chose information he knew would not identify diplomatic or intelligence sources by name.
Such training will help ensure UK forces are better prepared to identify and protect cultural property.
